name: Ain (France)
description: A banner of the composite arms of the département of Ain: quarterly under an overall silver cross, combining the emblems of its historic territories — Bresse (a silver lion on blue), Bugey (a red lion on silver), Dombes (blue strewn with gold fleurs-de-lis under a red bend) and Gex.
history: The département of Ain was assembled from several historic territories; its arms quarter their emblems beneath an overall silver cross.

features.role: quarterly for Bresse, Bugey, Dombes and Gex
an overall silver cross dividing the quarters
